zh.lifeSummary: Agnes Buckland Elmyn於1495年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德。她於1519年與John Abbott在英國英格蘭賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1545年在她的家鄉享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes Buckland Elmyn于1495年出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德。她于1519年与John Abbott在英国英格兰賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1545年在她的家乡享年50岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德。

nameMeanings.name: Elmyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Meyer, Yaakov, Hyman, Mandel, Shmul, Yitzhak.  Russian Boris, Igor, Leya, Misha, Semyon, Sofiya, Vladimir, Yefim, Yevgeny.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of Hellmann (see Heller ), reflecting varieties of Yiddish in which there is no h.
Americanized form of German Elmann: from a short form of the ancient Germanic personal name Adelman, composed of the elements adal ‘noble (family)’ + man ‘man’.

variants.name: Heller
meanings: German: nickname from the small medieval coin known as the häller or heller because it was first minted (in 1208) at the Swabian town of (Schwäbisch) Hall. Compare Hall .
German: topographic name for someone living by a field named with a word meaning ‘hell’ (see   Helle   1).

variants.name: Ellman
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English ele ‘oil’ + man, signifying a maker or seller of oils.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: Buckland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places in southern England (including nine in Devon) named Buckland, from Old English bōc ‘book’ + land ‘land’, i.e. land held by right of a written charter, as opposed to folcland, land held by right of custom.

variants.name: Bucklin
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form of Swiss German Büchlin, a very rare variant of Büchli (see Buchli ).

en.lifeSummary: Agnes Buckland Elmyn was born in 1495, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. She married John Abbott in 1519, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1545, in her hometown, at the age of 50, and was buried in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes Buckland Elmyn est née en 1495, à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé John Abbott en 1519, à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1545, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Buckland Elmynは1495年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードで生まれた。1519年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードでJohn Abbottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1545年に故郷で50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Buckland Elmyn(은)는 1495년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1519년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 John Abbott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1545년 그녀의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes Buckland Elmyn родилась в 1495 г. в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Abbott в 1519 г. в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1545 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
